items.name: Eclipse Pullpiri
items.description: Pullpiri is an open‑source orchestration platform optimized for in‑vehicle environments. Based on the K8S orchestration model, it has been redesigned for the unique constraints of automotive systems.

items.name: Eclipse Ankaios

items.name: Eclipse Symphony
items.description: Eclipse Symphony enables end-to-end orchestration experience and addresses it as a distinct concern. Its objective is to provide an easy-to-adopt, cost-effective, and consistent application...

items.name: Eclipse BlueChi™
items.description: Eclipse BlueChi™ is a deterministic multi-node service controller with a focus on highly regulated ecosystems. It is written in C and integrates seamless with systemd via its D-Bus API relaying D-Bus...
